html:
Exclusive to:

For the Shipwrecked item with a similar function, see Boat Repair Kit.

“Plugs leaks on boats.”

-

The Boat Patch is a craftable Item in the Seafaring Filter, exclusive to Don't Starve Together, and introduced in Return of Them.

Boat Patch can be used to patch a leak in a Boat and repair 25 . It can also be used directly to repair 25 .

During the Year of the Dragonfly Event, Boat Patches can also be obtained at a Dragonfly Shrine for 1 Lucky Gold Nugget each.

Trivia

  • The Boat Patch was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • Its recipe and repair value were altered in the March 2022 QoL update.

Gallery

  • A Boat leak repaired by a Boat Patch.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Boat Patch can be used to patch a leak in a Boat and repair 25 . It can also be used directly to repair 25 .
During the Year of the Dragonfly Event, Boat Patches can also be obtained at a Dragonfly Shrine for 1 Lucky Gold Nugget each.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Miếng vá Thuyền là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được trong Bộ Lọc Đi Biển, độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, và được giới thiệu trong Return of Them.
title: Boat Patch

{{Scrapbook Info|Plugs leaks on boats.}}
The '''Boat Patch''' is a craftable [[Item]] in the [[Seafaring Filter]], exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''.

Boat Patch can be used to patch a leak in a [[Boat Kit|Boat]] and repair 25 {{Hull}}. It can also be used directly to repair 25 {{Hull}}.

During the [[Year of the Dragonfly]] [[Event]], Boat Patches can also be obtained at a [[Dragonfly Shrine]] for 1 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]] each.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Boat Patch was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update.
* Its recipe and repair value were altered in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 24, 2022 - March 2022 QoL Update|March 2022 QoL update]].
